creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
Hello,

Could it be possible to have Mellanox ConnectX-3 drivers compiled into the base system please ?
We have systems with these network cards only, it's then quite tricky to install the system from the ISO / use the live CD.
It would then be nice to have the drivers built-in.

Drivers are already in the source tree :
sys/modules/mlxen
sys/modules/mlx4

I'm not sure this is still possible for 10.3 (would require ISO rebuild), but should be at least for 11 ?

Thank you very much,

Best regards,

Ben
